metadata.name: Nginx Dual-Config Deployment
metadata.purpose: Deploy and validate nginx configurations to staging and production servers using dual-config pattern (main nginx.conf + sites-available) with automated backup, testing, and rollback capabilities
metadata.author: DevOps / Infrastructure Team

executiveSummary.description: Automated bash script for deploying nginx configurations to remote servers (staging.ectropy.ai or production) using a dual-configuration pattern. Handles both root nginx.conf and environment-specific sites-available configurations with comprehensive validation, automatic backup, configuration testing, and rollback on failure.
keyChanges: Implements dual-config pattern: root nginx.conf + sites-available per environment
Automatic rollback on configuration test or reload failure
SSH key cleanup for CI/CD security
prerequisites: Bash shell environment (Linux, macOS, WSL, Git Bash)
SSH key configured (manual or via DO_SSH_KEY env var for CI/CD)
Target server has nginx installed and running
Server added to SSH known_hosts or StrictHostKeyChecking disabled
Configuration files exist locally: nginx.conf and environment-specific site config

preFlightChecks.name: Bash Shell Available
preFlightChecks.description: Verify script is running in bash environment

onFailure.message: This script requires bash. Run in Linux, macOS, WSL, or Git Bash.

preFlightChecks.name: SERVER_IP Environment Variable
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure SERVER_IP is set and not empty
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: SERVER_IP contains target server IP address

onFailure.message: SERVER_IP environment variable is not set. Run: export SERVER_IP=<server-ip>

preFlightChecks.name: SSH Authentication Configured
preFlightChecks.description: Verify SSH key exists (manual or CI/CD DO_SSH_KEY)
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: SSH key file exists or DO_SSH_KEY env var is set

onFailure.message: No SSH key found. Configure SSH key or set DO_SSH_KEY for CI/CD.

preFlightChecks.name: Main nginx.conf Exists
preFlightChecks.description: Verify root nginx.conf file is present
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: nginx.conf file exists in current directory

onFailure.message: Main configuration file not found: nginx.conf

preFlightChecks.name: Sites Configuration Exists
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: Environment-specific config file exists (staging.conf or production.conf)

preFlightChecks.name: SSH Connection Test
preFlightChecks.description: Verify SSH connection to target server

onFailure.message: Cannot connect to server. Verify SERVER_IP and SSH key configuration.

preFlightChecks.name: Nginx Installed on Server
preFlightChecks.description: Verify nginx is installed on target server

onFailure.message: nginx is not installed on target server

phases.name: Initialization and Validation
phases.description: Set up SSH credentials for CI/CD, validate configurations, and display deployment parameters

steps.name: Display Deployment Banner
steps.description: Show deployment header with script information
steps.purpose: Provide visual indication of deployment start

steps.name: Validate Environment Argument
steps.description: Ensure environment is 'staging' or 'production'
steps.command: if [[ ! "$ENVIRONMENT" =~ ^(staging|production)$ ]]; then echo -e "${RED}❌ Error: Invalid environment${NC}"; exit 1; fi
steps.purpose: Prevent deployment to invalid or unintended environments

steps.name: Verify SERVER_IP Set
steps.description: Check SERVER_IP environment variable is configured
steps.command: if [[ -z "${SERVER_IP}" ]]; then echo -e "${RED}❌ Error: SERVER_IP not set${NC}"; exit 1; fi
steps.purpose: Ensure target server is specified before attempting deployment

onFailure.message: SERVER_IP environment variable must be set

steps.name: Configure SSH Key (CI/CD)
steps.description: Write DO_SSH_KEY to ~/.ssh/id_rsa if running in CI/CD environment
steps.command: if [[ -n "${DO_SSH_KEY}" ]]; then mkdir -p ~/.ssh; echo "${DO_SSH_KEY}" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa; chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa; ssh-keyscan -H ${SERVER_IP} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null || true; fi
steps.purpose: Enable SSH authentication for automated deployments

steps.name: Set Configuration File Paths
steps.description: Determine sites-available config file based on environment
steps.purpose: Select correct environment-specific configuration file

steps.name: Validate Configuration Files Exist
steps.description: Verify both nginx.conf and sites config exist locally
steps.purpose: Prevent deployment attempt with missing configuration files

steps.name: Display Deployment Parameters
steps.description: Show environment, server, and file paths for confirmation
steps.purpose: Provide operator visibility into deployment targets

phases.name: Backup Existing Configurations
phases.description: Create timestamped backups of current nginx configurations before making changes

steps.name: Generate Backup Timestamp
steps.description: Create timestamp for backup file naming
steps.purpose: Ensure unique backup filenames for version tracking

steps.name: Backup Main nginx.conf
steps.description: Copy /etc/nginx/nginx.conf to timestamped backup
steps.command: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} "cp ${MAIN_REMOTE_PATH} ${MAIN_REMOTE_PATH}.backup.${TIMESTAMP}" || echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠️  Warning: Could not backup ${MAIN_REMOTE_PATH}${NC}"
steps.purpose: Preserve current main configuration for potential rollback

onFailure.message: File may not exist on first deployment

steps.name: Backup Sites-Available Config
steps.description: Copy sites-available config to timestamped backup
steps.command: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} "cp ${SITES_REMOTE_PATH} ${SITES_REMOTE_PATH}.backup.${TIMESTAMP}" 2>/dev/null || echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠️  Warning: Could not backup ${SITES_REMOTE_PATH}${NC}"
steps.purpose: Preserve current site configuration for potential rollback

onFailure.message: File may not exist on first deployment

steps.name: Verify Backups Created
steps.description: Confirm backup files exist on server
steps.purpose: Validate backup operation before proceeding with deployment
steps.expectedOutput: Backup files listed or warning if not created

phases.name: Deploy Configurations
phases.description: Copy new nginx configurations to server and create sites-enabled symlink

steps.name: Deploy Main nginx.conf
steps.description: SCP local nginx.conf to /etc/nginx/nginx.conf on server
steps.purpose: Update root nginx configuration with new settings

onFailure.message: Failed to deploy main nginx.conf. Check SSH connection and permissions.

steps.name: Deploy Sites-Available Config
steps.description: SCP environment-specific config to /etc/nginx/sites-available/
steps.purpose: Update site-specific configuration (routing, upstreams, SSL)

onFailure.message: Failed to deploy sites config. Check SSH connection and permissions.

steps.name: Create Sites-Enabled Symlink
steps.description: Link sites-available config to sites-enabled to activate it
steps.purpose: Enable the deployed site configuration in nginx

onFailure.message: Could not create symlink. Site may not be activated.

steps.name: Verify Deployed Files
steps.description: List deployed configuration files on server
steps.purpose: Confirm all configuration files are in place
steps.expectedOutput: File listings showing recently modified timestamps

phases.name: Test Configuration
phases.description: Validate nginx configuration syntax before applying changes

steps.name: Run nginx -t Validation
steps.description: Test nginx configuration syntax on server
steps.purpose: Detect configuration errors before reloading nginx
steps.expectedOutput: nginx: configuration file /etc/nginx/nginx.conf test is successful

onFailure.message: Nginx configuration test failed. Rolling back to previous configuration.

steps.name: Display Test Results
steps.description: Show nginx -t output for verification
steps.purpose: Provide operator confirmation that syntax is valid

phases.name: Reload Nginx
phases.description: Apply new configuration by gracefully reloading nginx

steps.name: Reload Nginx Service
steps.description: Execute systemctl reload nginx to apply new configuration
steps.purpose: Apply new configuration with zero downtime (graceful reload)

onFailure.message: Failed to reload nginx. Rolling back configurations.

steps.name: Verify Nginx Running
steps.description: Check nginx service status after reload
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx service is still running after reload

onFailure.message: Nginx is not active after reload. Rolling back.

steps.name: Display Reload Success
steps.description: Show success message for reload completion
steps.purpose: Confirm reload completed without errors

phases.name: Validate Endpoints (Health Checks)
phases.description: Test critical application endpoints to verify routing is working

steps.name: Determine Base URL
steps.description: Set BASE_URL based on environment (staging or production)
steps.command: if [[ "$ENVIRONMENT" == "staging" ]]; then BASE_URL="https://staging.ectropy.ai"; elif [[ "$ENVIRONMENT" == "production" ]]; then BASE_URL="https://${PROD_DOMAIN}"; fi
steps.purpose: Configure endpoint URLs for health checks

steps.name: Test Load Balancer Health
steps.description: Verify /lb-health endpoint responds
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx load balancer is routing health checks

steps.name: Test MCP Server Health
steps.description: Verify /health endpoint responds via nginx proxy
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx is proxying requests to MCP Server

steps.name: Test API Gateway Health
steps.description: Verify /api/health endpoint responds via nginx proxy
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx is proxying /api/* requests to API Gateway

steps.name: Test Web Dashboard
steps.description: Verify root path serves web dashboard
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx is serving static frontend or proxying to web service

steps.name: Evaluate Health Check Results
steps.description: Determine if any endpoints failed validation
steps.command: if [[ "$VALIDATION_FAILED" == "true" ]]; then echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠️  Warning: Some endpoints failed${NC}"; else echo -e "${GREEN}✅ All endpoints validated${NC}"; fi
steps.purpose: Summarize health check results

phases.name: Deployment Summary and Cleanup
phases.description: Display deployment summary, backup locations, and cleanup SSH keys

steps.name: Display Deployment Summary
steps.description: Show deployed files, backups, and next steps
steps.purpose: Provide operator with deployment confirmation and reference information

steps.name: Display Next Steps
steps.description: Show commands for monitoring logs and checking status
steps.command:
echo -e "
Next steps:
  • Monitor error logs: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} 'tail -f /var/log/nginx/error.log'
  • Check nginx status: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} 'systemctl status nginx'
  • View access logs: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} 'tail -f /var/log/nginx/access.log'"
steps.purpose: Guide operator on post-deployment monitoring activities

steps.name: Cleanup SSH Key (CI/CD)
steps.description: Remove temporary SSH key created from DO_SSH_KEY
steps.command: if [[ -n "${DO_SSH_KEY}" ]] && [[ -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa ]]; then echo -e "${BLUE}🧹 Cleaning up SSH key...${NC}"; rm -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa; fi
steps.purpose: Security cleanup: remove SSH key after deployment completes

triggerConditions: Nginx service becomes inactive after reload

steps.name: Restore Main nginx.conf Backup
steps.purpose: Revert root configuration to previous working state

steps.name: Restore Sites Config Backup
steps.purpose: Revert site configuration to previous working state

steps.name: Test Restored Configuration
steps.purpose: Verify restored configuration is syntactically valid

steps.name: Reload with Restored Config
steps.purpose: Apply restored configuration

steps.name: Verify Rollback Success
steps.command: ssh root@${SERVER_IP} "systemctl is-active nginx" && curl -f https://staging.ectropy.ai/lb-health
steps.purpose: Confirm nginx is running and responding after rollback

verification.successCriteria: Nginx is active and health endpoint returns 200 OK

successCriteria.criterion: Both nginx.conf and sites-available config deployed successfully
Nginx service remains active after reload
All critical health endpoints return HTTP 200
Timestamped backups created for both configs
successCriteria.validation: Backup files exist on server with timestamp

successCriteria.criterion: No error messages in nginx error log after reload

required.name: SERVER_IP
required.description: IP address of target deployment server

required.name: DO_SSH_KEY
required.description: SSH private key for CI/CD authentication (optional for manual deployments)

required.name: PROD_DOMAIN
required.description: Production domain name for health checks (only for production deployments)

supportedQueries.query: How do I deploy nginx config to staging?
supportedQueries.purpose: Quick deployment command for staging environment

supportedQueries.query: What files are deployed in the dual-config pattern?

supportedQueries.returns: Automatic rollback to previous configuration backups
supportedQueries.purpose: Understand failure handling and safety mechanisms

supportedQueries.query: How are backups created during deployment?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 2: Timestamped backups of both configs before any changes
supportedQueries.purpose: Understand backup strategy and rollback capability

supportedQueries.query: What health checks are performed after deployment?
supportedQueries.purpose: Validation and confidence in deployment success

supportedQueries.query: How do I rollback a failed nginx deployment?
supportedQueries.returns: 5-step automatic rollback: restore configs, test, reload, verify

decisionSupport: Always run in staging environment first before production
Verify SERVER_IP is correct before executing to avoid wrong-server deployments
For CI/CD, ensure DO_SSH_KEY secret is configured in GitHub Actions
Monitor error logs immediately after deployment for any issues
If health checks fail but nginx reloads successfully, investigate application layer issues
Keep backups for at least 7 days for potential rollback needs

architectureAlignment.routingConfig: Deploys nginx configs that route traffic per routing-architecture.json
architectureAlignment.portAllocation: Nginx proxies to standardized backend ports (3001, 4000, 3000)
architectureAlignment.oauthConfig: Nginx must not interfere with OAuth callback routing (/api/auth/callback)

knownIssues.title: SSH Connection Timeout in CI/CD
knownIssues.impact: Deployment fails if server is unreachable or SSH key is invalid
knownIssues.mitigation: Pre-flight check validates SSH connectivity before deployment
knownIssues.action: Verify DO_SSH_KEY secret is correctly configured and server allows connections

knownIssues.title: Health Checks May Fail on First Deployment
knownIssues.impact: Endpoints may return non-200 if backend services not yet running
knownIssues.mitigation: Health check failures marked as warnings, don't trigger rollback
knownIssues.action: Verify backend services are deployed and running before nginx deployment

knownIssues.title: Backups Accumulate Over Time
knownIssues.impact: Multiple deployments create many backup files consuming disk space
knownIssues.mitigation: Manual cleanup or implement automated retention policy

knownIssues.title: Production Domain Required for Health Checks
knownIssues.impact: Health checks skipped if PROD_DOMAIN not set for production deployments
knownIssues.mitigation: Script warns and skips validation if domain not configured
knownIssues.action: Set PROD_DOMAIN environment variable for production deployments
